blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.
Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 47°F.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
